title: Verify compose retry skips merged branches
description: Test that @kody compose retry on target #2780 (P1T26) skips already-merged sub-task branches from P2T28 and retries from the verify stage instead of re-running merge. Verifies the compose re-run behavior by checking GitHub run logs for 'merge.*skip' log entries and confirming verify/review stages re-execute.
existing_patterns: src/validation/compose.ts - Validator composition function that chains multiple validators
src/utils/retry-queue.ts - RetryQueue with maxRetries, backoff, dead-letter queue, and onRetry callback pattern
test-suite-2b-fire-p2-compose-revert/agent.md - P2T29 test definition with skip-merge and retry-from-verify verification criteria
kody-test-suite command - T20 compose retry verification using grep 'merge.*skip' log pattern
